glosses.yue: 令人失望; 使人失望
glosses.ja: 失望させる; がっかりさせる

translations.en: I don't want to disappoint you.
translations.fr: Je ne veux pas te décevoir.
translations.vi: Tôi không muốn làm bạn thất vọng.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हें निराश नहीं करना चाहता。
translations.sv: Jag vill inte göra dig besviken.
translations.ja: あなたをがっかりさせたくない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (1st sg, present) selecting the infinitive 'enttäuschen' to express intention.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular accusative; direct object of 'enttäuschen'.
Negation particle; negates the verb phrase headed by 'enttäuschen'.
Main lexical verb in bare infinitive; complements the modal auxiliary; transitive, taking an accusative object.

sentences.target: Das Ergebnis kann manche Fans enttäuschen.

translations.de: Das Ergebnis kann manche Fans enttäuschen.
translations.en: The result can disappoint some fans.
translations.es: El resultado puede decepcionar a algunos aficionados.
translations.fr: Le résultat peut décevoir certains supporters.
translations.it: Il risultato può deludere alcuni tifosi.
translations.ko: 결과가 일부 팬들을 실망시킬 수 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个结果可能会让一些球迷失望。
translations.yue: 個結果可能會令部分球迷失望。
translations.pt: O resultado pode decepcionar alguns torcedores.
translations.tr: Sonuç bazı taraftarları hayal kırıklığına uğratabilir.
translations.vi: Kết quả có thể làm một số người hâm mộ thất vọng.
translations.ar: قد تخيب النتيجة آمال بعض المشجعين.
translations.nl: De uitslag kan sommige fans teleurstellen.
translations.hu: Az eredmény csalódást okozhat néhány szurkolónak.
translations.hi: नतीजा कुछ प्रशंसकों को निराश कर सकता है.
translations.el: Το αποτέλεσμα μπορεί να απογοητεύσει μερικούς φιλάθλους.
translations.sv: Resultatet kan göra vissa supportrar besvikna.
translations.ro: Rezultatul îi poate dezamăgi pe unii suporteri.
translations.fi: Tulos voi tuottaa pettymyksen joillekin kannattajille.
translations.ja: この結果は一部のファンをがっかりさせるかもしれない。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular neuter; determiner of the subject noun 'Ergebnis'.
Common noun, nominative singular; syntactic subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (3rd sg, present) indicating ability/possibility; selects the infinitive 'enttäuschen'.
Indefinite quantifier determiner, accusative plural; modifies 'Fans' as the object.
Common noun, accusative plural; direct object of 'enttäuschen'.
Main lexical verb in bare infinitive; occurs clause-final as selected by the modal auxiliary.

sentences.target: Wir wollen die Kunden nicht enttäuschen.

translations.de: Wir wollen die Kunden nicht enttäuschen.
translations.en: We don't want to disappoint the customers.
translations.es: No queremos decepcionar a los clientes.
translations.fr: Nous ne voulons pas décevoir les clients.
translations.he: אנחנו לא רוצים לאכזב את הלקוחות.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi không muốn làm khách hàng thất vọng.
translations.ar: لا نريد أن نخيب آمال الزبائن.
translations.nl: We willen de klanten niet teleurstellen.
translations.hu: Nem akarunk csalódást okozni az ügyfeleknek.
translations.hi: हम ग्राहकों को निराश नहीं करना चाहते।
translations.el: Δεν θέλουμε να απογοητεύσουμε τους πελάτες.
translations.id: Kami tidak ingin mengecewakan para pelanggan.
translations.sv: Vi vill inte göra kunderna besvikna.
translations.ro: Nu vrem să-i dezamăgim pe clienți.
translations.ja: 私たちはお客様をがっかりさせたくありません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (1st pl, present) selecting the infinitive 'enttäuschen' to express intention.
Definite article, accusative plural; determiner of the direct object 'Kunden'.
Common noun, accusative plural; direct object of 'enttäuschen'.
Negation particle; scopes over the verb phrase headed by 'enttäuschen'.
Main lexical verb in bare infinitive; complements the modal auxiliary; transitive with an accusative object.

sentences.target: Seine Noten könnten die Eltern enttäuschen.

translations.de: Seine Noten könnten die Eltern enttäuschen.
translations.en: His grades could disappoint the parents.
translations.es: Sus notas podrían decepcionar a sus padres.
translations.fr: Ses notes pourraient décevoir ses parents.
translations.it: I suoi voti potrebbero deludere i genitori.
translations.ko: 그의 성적은 부모님을 실망시킬 수 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他的成绩可能会让父母失望。
translations.yue: 佢嘅成績可能會令父母失望。
translations.pt: As notas dele podem decepcionar os pais.
translations.he: הציונים שלו עלולים לאכזב את ההורים.
translations.tr: Notları anne babasını hayal kırıklığına uğratabilir.
translations.vi: Điểm của cậu ấy có thể làm bố mẹ thất vọng.
translations.nl: Zijn cijfers kunnen zijn ouders teleurstellen.
translations.uk: Його оцінки можуть розчарувати його батьків.
translations.hu: A jegyei csalódást okozhatnak a szüleinek.
translations.hi: उसके अंक उसके माता-पिता को निराश कर सकते हैं.
translations.el: Οι βαθμοί του μπορεί να απογοητεύσουν τους γονείς του.
translations.nb: Karakterene hans kan skuffe foreldrene hans.
translations.sv: Hans betyg kan göra hans föräldrar besvikna.
translations.ro: Notele lui i-ar putea dezamăgi pe părinții lui.
translations.cs: Jeho známky by mohly zklamat jeho rodiče.
translations.da: Hans karakterer kan skuffe hans forældre.
translations.fi: Hänen arvosanansa voivat tuottaa pettymystä vanhemmilleen.
translations.ja: 彼の成績は両親をがっかりさせるかもしれない。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative plural agreement with 'Noten'; marks possession by a 3rd person singular masculine referent.
Common noun, nominative plural; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (3rd pl, Konjunktiv II) expressing possibility; selects the infinitive 'enttäuschen'.
Definite article, accusative plural; determiner of the direct object 'Eltern'.
Common noun (pluralia tantum), accusative plural; direct object of 'enttäuschen'.
Main lexical verb in bare infinitive; complements the modal auxiliary; transitive verb.
